name: Brigitte's Real German Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Pickle juice OR 1/2 teaspoon Vinegar and 1/2 teaspoon sugar
4 tablespoons Heaping No Fat Miracle Whip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together carefully, season to taste.
2. Garnish with parsley.
3. Cool in refrigerator for at least 1-2 hours, best overnight.
